render_readiness_checks: GPU is visible to ChimeraX render pipeline (offscreen still benefits from GPU)
ChimeraX command-script template exists and parses
All upstream wave outputs are aggregated under /workspace/structure-factory/atlas-inputs
notes: Distinct from chimerax.license-gate.v1.json (the upstream gate probe). The .ready variant assumes the operator has confirmed noncommercial use (or recorded a commercial license override) per the tooling-and-licensing doc and adds render-readiness checks. Status remains gated; operator must clear noncommercial confirmation before render-lane promotion.
